atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define design tokens (theme variables) for utilities.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: register content globs for class detection.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define a custom utility.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define a custom variant.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define a custom variant with a selector.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: load a JavaScript plugin.

atDirectives.name: @import
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: pull in Tailwind and other sheets (e.g. `@import "tailwindcss"`).

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: inline utility classes inside a CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: import for reference only so `@apply` / variants resolve without emitting that CSS.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: load a legacy JS/TS Tailwind config from the CSS entry.
